Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO VETERANS' AFFAIRS

Title: Relates to contracts by service-disabled veteran-owned business enterprises
Summary: Increases the statewide goal for participation on state contracts by service-disabled veteran-owned business enterprises from six to eight percent.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the veterans' services law, in relation to a statewide goal for participation on state contracts by service-disabled veteran-owned business enterprises
